accessibility.text: HEAVENS_GATE_V2.mov
EXAMPLES
ARC'TERYX_logo.svg.png
Screenshot 2023-07-10 at 7.33.21 PM.png
JOURNEY FILM EXAMPLE - SELF MADE
66a49ca80be1085b4e362252e0eb695b.jpeg
This film is a good example of how ARC’TERYX clothing and gear could naturally fit in the content of these journey films.
KYOTOGRAPHIE, BMW EXAMPLE FILM - PRODUCTION COMPANY
ARC’TERYX - AML-ART at GYRE GALLERY, OMOTESANDO
A series of 3 short films, 2-5 minutes, will be made for ARC’TERYX Japan
The films can be used in Social Media promotions to drive awareness, excitement and acknowledge ARC’TERYX Japan role in the GYRE Exhibition.
A longer more dramatic film can be used at the ARC’TERYX Japan retail.
